purpose: Data-only regression fixtures for the conservative SPY Ideal starter option contract-selection rule. These fixtures use cheap starter Databento rows only and do not choose a real trade, backtest, calculate P&L, prove profitability, or mark readiness.

rule_summary.strike: lowest reviewed-universe call strike at or above candidate trigger
rule_summary.quote_timestamp: nearest TCBBO quote at or before signal time by ts_event
rule_summary.open_interest: >= 1 only if setup-time-safe same-contract open interest exists in starter data
rule_summary.fallback: none after top-ranked contract fails a gate

fixtures.reason: The top-ranked SPY Ideal starter long call is 2026-05-27 C745, but its only local starter quote and trade row are after the 2026-05-13T15:30:00Z setup boundary.
Missing trigger/level blocks Ideal contract selection instead of guessing a strike.

explicit_non_goals: No raw Databento files are modified.
No fallback scan after the top-ranked contract fails is authorized.
No backtest, entry, fill, exit, P&L, proof, profitability, readiness, live, broker, order, account, main.py, or Railway behavior is authorized.
